code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output: a single rating 1-5 (e.g. "Rating: 3" or just "3")
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
1. 1-Star: Complete failure, defective, unsafe, or returned. Strong negativity with no redeeming qualities. "Wouldn't buy again" or safety issues → 1.
2. 2-Star: More negative than positive with significant flaws. Product has limited function but disappoints. "Cheap," "misleading," or "pain to use" suggests 2.
3. 3-Star: Balanced mix of pros and cons. "Okay," "average," "better than nothing," or functional with clear limitations. Neither side dominates.
4. 4-Star: Mostly positive with minor criticisms. Works well overall. "Pretty good," "above average," or moderate recommendation without strong enthusiasm.
5. 5-Star: Strong enthusiasm and clear recommendation. Exceeds expectations, "love," "perfect," "excellent." Inherent/expected drawbacks in glowing reviews → 5.
6. Mixed utility: "Great for X but not for Y" without overall enthusiasm → 3. Single limitation in otherwise positive review → 4.
7. Updates: Use final evaluation. Initial praise overridden by later disappointment → lower rating accordingly.
8. Sarcasm detection: Positive words in obvious failure context ("Great - it broke immediately") → 1 or 2.
9. Very short positive reviews: "Sturdy and attractive" → 5 if unequivocal, 4 if slightly qualified.
10. Price praised despite limitations: Satisfies despite drawbacks → 4, exceeds value expectations → 5.
11. Strong satisfaction with minor inconvenience: Can be 5 if overall tone is very positive and inconvenience is trivial (e.g., heavy package, setup time). Perfection not required.
12. Neutral descriptions without clear sentiment: Purely factual/descriptive reviews lean toward 3 unless positive/negative tone emerges.
13. Distinguish 2 vs 3: More negative than positive with significant flaws → 2. Balanced mix → 3. "Better than nothing" → 3.
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: I bought this machine after reading pretty good customer reviews and boy how I regret it. The first time I used it I noticed more spots when I was through than when I started. My granddaughter can be a bit messy and I bought this to clean little dri...
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: Very poor quality. Cheap fabric, not as pictured and the color was off. Returned the next day.
Rating: 1

Example 3:
Review: This was pretty straightforward to put together, feels very sturdy, leaves lots of room underneath for storage (plus a little space I left open because the dog seems to be happy about being able to curl up under there and use it as a hiding place), allowed us to get rid of the box spring, and hasn't...
Rating: 2

Example 4:
Review: The cushions are okay, but the size was waaaay off for my rocker. I'm still using it though because it is better than nothing.
Rating: 3

Example 5:
Review: These are really nice IF you only use them for bigger items. They are too thick and bulky for smaller items.
Rating: 3

Example 6:
Review: I'd rate this as pretty good although it doesn't feel quite as heavy duty as the ones we've been using for the past few years... Overall I'd rate this as above average although only time will tell how durable it is.
Rating: 4

Example 7:
Review: I like this towel. It is 100% Turkish cotton and measures 27 inches by 55 inches. The dobby weave is somewhat intricate so you are going to get some good absorbency. This towel also comes in a bath sheet, which is competitively priced with the local stores.
Rating: 4

Example 8:
Review: After a couple days a giant (though compact by queen sized bed standards) box arrived, and while I anticipated the weight (I've had a few of these shipped to me), it's still heavy. Ideally you'll get this unpacked in the AM, as it does take a moment to expand, but once set up it's incredibly comfortable and supportive. Exactly what we needed!
Rating: 5

Example 9:
Review: This is a sharp well made tablecloth. It's strengths are the vibrant colors, sharp contrast, and solid construction. The cons are just the inherent need to iron it that comes from the cotton.
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END

    - Example: "Wish I had ordered the small ones. These are quite large for most kitchen counters. They will do the job but I will put them in a drawer. I like the colors.and the material." (gold=4, pred=3, workers=[3, 3, 4], disagreement=0.17)

  1. Review: "I wanted to try Midnight Scoop because it promised to be easy on the wrists and joints and it is. To use it you must learn a new way of scooping and to hold it differently. It is held at the back end then pushed forward in a straight line. There is. ..."

  3. Review: "These deep teal color of these clothes was exactly the shade I was hoping they would be. Sometimes things are called teal but aren't very true to the color, but these are. It's my teen daughter's favorite color and one of the colors we used in the de..."

  4. Review: "I bought this machine after reading pretty good customer reviews and boy how I regret it.

The first time I used it I noticed more spots when I was through than when I started. My granddaughter can be a bit messy and I bought this to clean little dri..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [1, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "I love this vacuum and ditto the other lovers reviews. It really does go under almost anything and is very handy.

.UPDATE after 2 yrs of  major problems which were rectified thru customer service I am giving up and moving on."

  6. Review: "There are two kinds of DII fabric storage bins - the ones that are reinforced and the ones that aren't. The ones that aren't tend to flop around and tip over. The ones that are reinforced are so much better. This one is the better style that actually..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "They're okay, but not extraordinary. They seem to be well made and are holding up so far with no problems, and the fact that you can toss them into the washing machine to be cleaned is nice. They're just a bit on the thin side as well, though, so you..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 3, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Since buying this product and it dying 12 months later I've owned numerous carpet cleaners including the Bissel Proheat 2X Pet Lift Off and the at-home version of the Rug Doctor. Both of these blew the performance of this machine out of the water. Th..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [2, 2, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "The great thing about this product is that it works perfectly. The bad thing is that if you want to buy it on Amazon now (as of September 2011), you'll have to wait for 1 to 2 months.
But a little about the device. Personally, I am very satisfied. Th..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 3, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "My Granny used cast iron pans to fry her cornbread, bacon, and chicken, and as a consequence I've always had the utmost admiration for the wonders Lodgeware can produce.

I didn't truly fall in love with cast iron until later when I began cooking wit..."
